compiled_state.title: Add dso: short-circuit path assertions to test-discover-agents.sh
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description: test-discover-agents.sh has no assertions for the llm_behavioral category or the dso: short-circuit path. The behavioral invariant is verified in test-agent-routing-conf.sh but direct coverage in test-discover-agents.sh is missing.

comments.body: Classification: mechanical. Adding llm_behavioral=dso:bot-psychologist assertions to existing test cases + dedicated dso: short-circuit test.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
